task_completion.description: Verify the Inbound Group was created with the correct ID and Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'RECALL01' in the Group ID field and 'Product Recall Hotline' in the Group Name field on the Inbound Group configuration page or the group listings.

task_completion.description: Verify the group is set to Active and has the correct color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Y' selected in the Active dropdown/radio button and 'FF0000' entered in the Group Color field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Queue Priority and Next Agent Call routing settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '99' entered in the Queue Priority field and 'longest_wait_agent' selected in the Next Agent Call dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the Fronter Display and In-Group Recording Override settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Y' selected for Fronter Display and 'ALLCALLS' selected in the In-Group Recording Override dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the Drop Call Seconds and After Hours Action settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '360' entered in the Drop Call Seconds field and 'MESSAGE' selected in the After Hours Action dropdown.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial Admin web interface to create the group.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vicidial web interface in a browser, not a terminal executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form to save the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'INBOUND GROUP ADDED' or 'SUCCESS') or the group appearing in the 'Show Inbound Groups' list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the expected values into a text editor or dummy page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the actual Vicidial Inbound Group configuration form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Group ID: RECALL01. Expected Group Name: Product Recall Hotline. Expected Group Color: FF0000. Expected Active status: Y. Expected Queue Priority: 99. Expected Next Agent Call: longest_wait_agent. Expected Fronter Display: Y. Expected In-Group Recording Override: ALLCALLS. Expected Drop Call Seconds: 360. Expected After Hours Action: MESSAGE.
